overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian town with mud-brick buildings, palm trees, and temple ruins. The character traverses sunlit streets, passes through a covered alleyway, and emerges near a waterfront where horses gallop past, before continuing through a busy street toward a fortified tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with ornate temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the main street, passing palm trees and approaching an ornate temple entrance on the right

notable_agents.action: group of women standing and conversing near a mud brick wall

entered.detail: decorated building facade with blue and white patterns and stone steps
tall palm trees lining the dirt street
traditional mud brick residential structure with small windows
distant stone temple ruins visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt street lined with palm trees and mud-brick buildings. An ornate temple entrance with decorative patterns stands prominently on the right, while ancient ruins are visible in the distance ahead. A small group of women converse near a wall on the left as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple ruins district with ancient stone columns

events.description: passing from main street into area dominated by ancient temple ruins
character turns left onto narrower residential street

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive ancient temple ruins and turning left into a residential quarter

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the ornate temple entrance and approaches the ancient stone temple ruins, which rise prominently on the right side. The ruins feature tall stone columns and weathered blocks. As the character continues, they turn left onto a narrower street lined with residential mud-brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential quarter with multi-story mud brick houses

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow residential streets with multi-story mud brick buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: elderly man in traditional robes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall residential structure with weathered walls and wooden ladders
rustic wooden ladders and platforms attached to building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow residential street flanked by multi-story mud-brick buildings with wooden scaffolding and ladders. Overhead ropes stretch between structures. An elderly man walks toward the camera as the ancient temple ruins disappear from view behind the dense urban fabric.

events.description: entering covered passage between buildings with thatched overhead covering
exiting covered passage into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through a shaded covered alleyway with hanging fabrics and emerging into bright light

notable_agents.action: man walking ahead through the passage toward the exit

entered.detail: narrow alleyway with thatched roof overhead and white support columns
building walls covered in dense green ivy and flowering vines
large decorated ceramic urns placed outside doorways

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered alleyway with a thatched roof that provides shade from the midday sun. The passage features walls covered in dense ivy, large storage jars, and hanging fabrics. Following another man through the corridor, the character emerges back into bright sunlight at the far end.

events.description: group of horses gallops past from right to left kicking up dust

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path as horses suddenly gallop past toward the river

notable_agents.action: horses galloping past the character toward the waterfront

entered.detail: large stone archway with steps leading to upper level
body of water visible beyond the dirt path with vegetation along the banks
palm trees lining the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the scene opens to a wide waterfront path with a stone archway on the right and a river visible to the left. Palm trees line the path. Suddenly, a group of horses gallops past from right to left, kicking up dust as they head toward the water. The character continues walking along the shore.

events.description: entering busier street with defensive fortification visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly crowded streets toward a large fortified tower

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople walking in same direction toward the fortification

entered.detail: large fortified tower with crenellations and a red flag on top

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the waterfront behind and enters a busier street with more pedestrians walking in the same direction. A large defensive tower with a red flag rises prominently ahead, growing larger as the character approaches. The street narrows as it leads toward the fortification, with mud-brick buildings and wooden scaffolding lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian town, transitioning from open sunlit streets and temple ruins into a dense residential district before emerging at a bustling waterfront. It begins along a dirt road lined with palm trees and mud-brick buildings, passing an ornate temple entrance and weathered stone columns before turning into a narrower residential street. As the camera moves deeper into the urban fabric, the open ruins are replaced by multi-story buildings with wooden scaffolding and overhead ropes, eventually leading into a shaded, ivy-covered alleyway filled with storage jars and hanging fabrics. The scene then opens back into bright sunlight at a wide waterfront path where a group of horses gallops past toward the river. Finally, the camera leaves the shore to enter a busy street, moving past pedestrians as a large defensive tower with a red flag looms ahead.
